text:
Another controversy has engulfed the 2024 ParisOlympicsbut this time it involves gender and boxing.

False allegations have been swirling around conservative media outlets and online spaces that Algerian boxer Imane Khelif is a transgender woman in the women's competition. Right-wing conservative figures likeDonald Trump,Elon Musk,J.K. Rowlingand many others have openly perpetuated this conspiracy theory online.

The controversy began when the fight betweenГӮВ Italian boxer Angela Carini and Khelif swiftly ended after a mere 46 seconds on Thursday. Carini broke out in tears and left the ring, withdrawing from the match. After the match, she told reporters, ГўВҖВңI was told a lot of times that I was a warrior but I preferred to stop for my health. I have never felt a punch like this,ГўВҖВқ The Hollywood Reporterreported.

Carini has sincepublically apologizedto Khelif in an interview with an Italian newspaper,ГӮВ Gazzetta dello Sport. She said, "I'm sorry for my opponent, too. If the [The International Olympic Committee] said she can fight, I respect that decision," The BBCreported.

Related

About dropping out of the match, she said, "It wasn't something I intended to do. Actually, I want to apologize to her and everyone else. I was angry because my Olympics had gone up in smoke. I donГўВҖВҷt have anything against Khelif. Actually, if I were to meet her again I would embrace her."

However, Carini's withdrawal has ignited a gender-centered culture war. Her opponent, Khelif, is one of two boxers allowed to compete in Paris after being disqualified from the womenГўВҖВҷs world championships in 2023 for failing testosterone and gender eligibility tests. The IOC called the decision to bar Khelif and another boxer from the championship as a ГўВҖВңsudden and arbitrary decision," USA Todayreported.ГӮ

Khelif was raised as and identifies as a woman and is not transgender nor intersex. According to theIOC, Khelif has a difference inГӮВ sexual development (DSD), which is not the same as being transgender. This can mean that some people who develop as a woman can also have XY chromosomes. Despite women with DSD currently being allowed to compete in women's sports at the Olympics, that has not stopped conservative media from misgendering Khelif.

Musk has postedГӮmultiple times on XГӮВ about the match between the women. He argued, "Men donГўВҖВҷt belong in womenГўВҖВҷs sports."

In a series of tweets, Rowling also misgendered Khelif. The author posted a picture of the two women, stating, "Could any picture sum up our new menГўВҖВҷs rights movement better? The smirk of a male whoГўВҖВҷs knows heГўВҖВҷs protected by a misogynist sporting establishment enjoying the distress of a woman heГўВҖВҷs just punched in the head, and whose lifeГўВҖВҷs ambition heГўВҖВҷs just shattered."

Could any picture sum up our new menГўВҖВҷs rights movement better? The smirk of a male whoГўВҖВҷs knows heГўВҖВҷs protected by a misogynist sporting establishment enjoying the distress of a woman heГўВҖВҷs just punched in the head, and whose lifeГўВҖВҷs ambition heГўВҖВҷs just shattered.#Paris2024pic.twitter.com/Q5SbKiksXQ

ГўВҖВ” J.K. Rowling (@jk_rowling)August 1, 2024



In another post, Rowling said, ГўВҖВңA young female boxer has just had everything sheГўВҖВҷs worked and trained for snatched away because [the IOC] allowed a male to get in the ring with her."

A young female boxer has just had everything sheГўВҖВҷs worked and trained for snatched away because you allowed a male to get in the ring with her. YouГўВҖВҷre a disgrace, your ГўВҖВҳsafeguardingГўВҖВҷ is a joke and#Paris24will be forever tarnished by the brutal injustice done to Carini.https://t.co/JMKzVljpyr

ГўВҖВ” J.K. Rowling (@jk_rowling)August 1, 2024



Trump has also postedГӮon Truth Social, ГӮВ "I will keep men out of womenГўВҖВҷs sports!ГўВҖВқ The Republican presidential nominee once said on ГўВҖВңThe Clay Travis and Buck Sexton Show,ГўВҖВқ that ГўВҖВңwhat gets the biggest applauseГўВҖВқ at his rallies is saying, ГўВҖВңWe will not allow men to play in womenГўВҖВҷs sports,ГўВҖВқ Rolling Stonereported.

Despite the misgendering of Khelif, the IOC issued a statement defendingГӮВ her and the other disqualified boxer, Taiwan's Lin Yu-ting.ГӮВ ГўВҖВңThe IOC is saddened by the abuse that the two athletes are currently receiving. Every person has the right to practice sport without discrimination,ГўВҖВқ it read. "We obviously condemn the harassment of which [Khelif] is a victim. Hate, denigration and insults are the opposite of the values we defend."

The IOC's spokesperson Mark Adams alsoГӮurgedpeople on Friday to be more mindful about discussing Khelif and Lin.ГӮВ ГўВҖВңWhat I would urge is that we try to take the culture war out of this and actually address the issues and think about the individuals and the people concerned. Real damage is being done by misinformation.ГўВҖВқ

Marks reiterated, ГўВҖВңThe Algerian boxer was born a female, was registered a female, lived her life as a female, boxed as a female, has a female passport. This is not a transgender case. There has been some confusion that somehow itГўВҖВҷs a man fighting a woman. This is just not the case, scientifically on that, there is consensus. Scientifically, this is not a man fighting a woman. And I think we need to kind of get that out.ГўВҖВқ

Also, Adams clarified that gender eligibility is an unsatisfactory system, dubbing it as a "minefield." He continued, "There are many women with higher [testosterone] levels than men so the idea that a testosterone test is some kind of magic bullet is not true."ГӮ

title: "This is not a man fighting a woman": Olympics boxing controversy ignites conservative culture war - Salon.com
author: Nardos Haile
description: Conservative figures like Donald Trump, Elon Musk and JK Rowling fuel culture war in Olympic women's boxing
